ogTitle: Curl Curl vs Curlew Waters: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Curl Curl and Curlew Waters.
heading: Curl Curl vs Curlew Waters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Curl Curl, New South Wales and Curlew Waters, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Curl Curl has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Curlew Waters (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Curl Curl or Curlew Waters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Curl Curl has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Curlew Waters scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Curl Curl scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Curlew Waters scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Curl Curl or Curlew Waters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Curl Curl has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
